zh.lifeSummary: 當Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster於1380年出生在愛爾蘭時，他的父親King Niall 'Og' O'Neill14歲，母親Una O'Neill21歲。他於大約1404年與Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1456年在愛爾蘭昆恩斯 庫迪可提亞德 豪斯享年76歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster于1380年出生在爱尔兰时，他的父亲King Niall 'Og' O'Neill14岁，母亲Una O'Neill21岁。他于大约1404年与Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1456年在爱尔兰昆恩斯 庫迪可提亞德 豪斯享年76岁，埋葬在爱尔兰。

nameMeanings.name: O'Neill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan, Dermot, Liam, Nuala, Bridie, Brigid, Conor, Fintan, John Patrick.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Néill ‘descendant of Niall’, an Irish personal name possibly derived from néal ‘cloud’ (see Neil ).

History: Bearers of this surname mostly claim descent from Niall Noígíallach (Niall of the Nine Hostages), a legendary king of Ireland who flourished in the 5th century. His descendants, the Ui Neill dynasty, dominated Ireland, on and off, from the 6th to the 10th century. The surname itself can be traced with some confidence to one of these descendants, namely Niall Glúndubh mac Aodha (died 919), High King of Ireland from 911 to 919, with a power base in Tyrone, Ulster.

variants.name: O'Neall
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: McNelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Brendan.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Niallghuis ‘son of Niallghus’, a personal name (intended as complimentary) composed of the personal name Niall (see O'Neill ) + gus ‘vigor’. In Irish the combination of [k] and [n] was generally pronounced [kr], Anglicized as the variants McCreless and McCrillis .

variants.name: O'Neal
meanings: Irish (Longford, Down): variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: O'Niel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Odneal
meanings: Perhaps an irregular variant of Irish   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Nealon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Declan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Nialláin ‘descendant of Niallán’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of Niall, see O'Neill , Neil .

variants.name: O'Neil
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conn, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Aileen, Eamon, Michael Patrick, Seamus, Sean Patrick, William Sean.
Irish (Mayo, Tipperary): variant of   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Scottish, English (Lancashire), and Irish (Munster): from the Gaelic personal name Niall (genitive Néill), possibly derived from Irish néal ‘cloud’. In most cases the name probably represents a shortened form of the derived patronymics McNeill or the comparable Irish O'Neill .
English: variant of   Neal  .

variants.name: O'Neel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Neill  .

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

nameMeanings.name: Eoghan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, supposedly derived from iúr ‘yew’ and meaning ‘born of yew’. It was borne in Irish legend by one of the two sons of Niall of the Nine Hostages.

variants.name: Euan
meanings: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Eóghan, now also bestowed by parents without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Ewan
meanings: The usual Anglicized form in Scotland and Northern Ireland of Gaelic Eóghan . It is also found in northern England from the 14th century onwards, and since the late 1990s has been one of the Gaelic names that enjoy wider currency.

variants.name: Evan
meanings: As a Welsh name this represents an Anglicized form of Iefan , a later development of Ieuan . As a Scottish name it is a variant of Euan . It is now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Mor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster was born in 1380, in Ireland, his father, King Niall 'Og' O'Neill, was 14 and his mother, Una O'Neill, was 21. He married Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins about 1404, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1456, in Crettyard House, Queen's County, Ireland, at the age of 76, and was buried in Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster est né en 1380, à Irlande, son père, King Niall 'Og' O'Neill, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Una O'Neill, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins environ 1404, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1456, à Crettyard House, Queen's County, Irlande, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster 1380 in Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Niall 'Og' O'Neill 14 und seine Mutter Una O'Neill 21. Er hat um 1404 in Irland Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1456 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Crettyard House, Queen's County, Irland und wurde in Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster è nato il nel 1380 nel Irlanda, il suo padre, King Niall 'Og' O'Neill, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Una O'Neill, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins circa 1404, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1456, nel Crettyard House, Queen's County, Irlanda, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulsterが1380年にアイルランドで生まれた時，父King Niall 'Og' O'Neillは14歳，母Una O'Neillは21歳であった。約1404年にアイルランドでQueen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higginsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1456年にアイルランドクイーン'ス コウントイクレットヤルド ホーウゼで76歳で死去し，アイルランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster(이)가 1380년 아일랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Niall 'Og' O'Neill(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Una O'Neill(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1404년 아일랜드에서 Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1456년 아일랜드 퀸'스 카운티 크레티아어드 허스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster nasceu em 1380, em Irlanda, seu pai, King Niall 'Og' O'Neill, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Una O'Neill, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins aproximadamente 1404, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1456, em Crettyard House, Queen's County, Irlanda, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owen Eoghan Mor O'Neill - King of Ulster родился в 1380 г. в местности Ирландия, его отцу по имени King Niall 'Og' O'Neill было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Una O'Neill, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins около 1404 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1456 г. в местности креттярд хоус, куин'с коунти, Ирландия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности Ирландия.

Se casó con Queen Catherine MacMahon - Tyrone Princess of Oriel of Ulster Higgins aproximadamente 1404, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1456, en Crettyard House, Queen's County, Irlanda, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Irlanda.
